# PROJECT: PROFESSIONAL RESUME / PERSONAL BRAND WEBSITE

You are acting as a Senior Staff Frontend Engineer + UX Designer + Personal Branding Expert.

Goal:
Create a premium, modern, highly polished professional portfolio / resume website.

This should NOT feel like a generic portfolio template.

Think:
Apple × Vercel × Stripe × AI Engineer Portfolio × Premium Personal Brand.

The website should strongly reflect:

- Senior QA Engineer
- AI / Agentic AI / Automation mindset
- Software Engineering understanding
- Product Builder mindset
- Technical Leadership potential
- Clean modern premium design

The UI should feel:
Elegant, premium, animated, futuristic but professional.

NO childish gaming visuals.

Avoid:
- Generic bootstrap feel
- Overly colorful templates
- Cheap portfolio styles
- Cluttered UI
- Heavy visual noise

---------------------------------------
TECH STACK
---------------------------------------

Use:

- Next.js
- React
- TypeScript
- TailwindCSS
- Framer Motion
- Next/Image
- Responsive Design
- App Router

Code expectations:

- Production quality code
- Clean folder structure
- Reusable components
- Component driven architecture
- Maintainability first
- Accessibility considerations
- SEO friendly setup

---------------------------------------
VISUAL DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
---------------------------------------

Theme:

Dark Premium Professional Theme.

Primary Colors:

Deep charcoal black
Graphite gray
Premium orange accent
White typography

Possible palette:

Background: #0B0B0B
Surface: #151515
Card: #1C1C1C
Accent: #FF6A00
Text Primary: #F5F5F5
Text Secondary: #A0A0A0

Use:

- subtle gradients
- glow effects
- premium shadows
- clean borders
- glassmorphism only where appropriate
- micro animations

Design inspiration:

- Apple
- Vercel
- Linear
- Stripe
- Framer
- Raycast
- OpenAI

Avoid:
cyberpunk overload.

Professional first.

---------------------------------------
SITE STRUCTURE
---------------------------------------

Build these sections:

1. NAVBAR

Requirements:

sticky navbar
blur backdrop
responsive
clean animations

Include:

- Logo / Initials
- Home
- About
- Experience
- Skills
- Projects
- Certifications
- Resume Download
- Contact

Smooth scrolling.

---------------------------------------

2. HERO SECTION

This is the most important section.

Must immediately communicate:

Senior QA Engineer.
AI + Automation Builder.
Technical Problem Solver.

Include:

Name
Role Title
Power headline
Short professional summary.

Examples of tone:

"Building intelligent automation, scalable testing systems, and AI-driven engineering solutions."

CTA Buttons:

- Download Resume
- Explore Projects
- Connect

Hero should include:

- animated intro
- subtle motion
- premium typography
- visual hierarchy

Optional:

animated gradient orb background.

---------------------------------------

3. ABOUT SECTION

Not generic.

Tell professional story.

Cover:

- QA background
- Automation expertise
- AI interest
- Engineering mindset
- Continuous learning
- Product thinking

Make it concise but strong.

---------------------------------------

4. EXPERIENCE TIMELINE

Professional timeline section.

Premium timeline UI.

Include:

Company
Role
Duration
Achievements
Technology stack.

Animation on scroll.

Clean card layout.

---------------------------------------

5. TECH STACK / SKILLS SECTION

Highly visual.

Use categorized groups:

Testing:
- Selenium
- Playwright
- Appium
- JMeter
- RestAssured

Languages:
- Java
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- Python

AI:
- Prompt Engineering
- Agentic AI
- LLM workflows
- AI tooling

DevOps:
- Docker
- GitHub Actions
- CI/CD
- Jenkins

Cloud:
- Azure
- AWS basics

UI ideas:

animated badges
progress visualization
glow cards

Do NOT use ugly skill bars.

---------------------------------------

6. PROJECTS SECTION

High importance.

Projects must feel product-grade.

Each project card should include:

title
description
problem solved
tech stack
outcome
github/demo links

Premium interactive cards.

Hover effects.

Examples:

- AI Workflow Builder
- Automation Framework
- Internal QA Platform
- Agentic AI Experiments
- Personal Side Projects

---------------------------------------

7. CERTIFICATIONS SECTION

Modern certification showcase.

Card grid.

Include:

title
provider
date
credential link

Optional:
animated verification style UI.

---------------------------------------

8. RESUME SECTION

Professional download section.

Include:

Resume Preview.

Download button.

Optional:
embedded PDF preview.

---------------------------------------

9. CONTACT SECTION

Professional contact area.

Include:

Email
LinkedIn
GitHub
Optional socials.

Clean layout.

No cheesy contact forms unless well designed.

---------------------------------------

10. FOOTER

Minimal premium footer.

---------------------------------------
ANIMATION EXPECTATIONS
---------------------------------------

Use Framer Motion carefully.

Desired animation style:

Subtle.
Premium.
Smooth.

Use:

fade in
slide in
hover elevation
parallax accents
micro interactions

Avoid:

flashy animations
cheap bounce effects
over-animation

---------------------------------------
RESPONSIVENESS
---------------------------------------

Must be excellent on:

Desktop
Laptop
Tablet
Mobile

Mobile experience must not feel downgraded.

---------------------------------------
CONTENT EXPECTATIONS
---------------------------------------

Use realistic placeholder professional content.

Do NOT use lorem ipsum.

Generate meaningful copy.

---------------------------------------
CODE EXPECTATIONS
---------------------------------------

Create:

clean file structure.

Example:

src/
 app/
 components/
 sections/
 data/
 lib/

Create reusable sections.

Prefer data-driven architecture.

Separate data from UI where appropriate.

---------------------------------------
DELIVERY EXPECTATION
---------------------------------------

Work iteratively.

First:
Create layout architecture.

Then:
Implement navbar + hero.

Then:
Add sections one by one.

Do not generate everything blindly.

Maintain high design quality.

Think like a Senior Product Engineer designing a flagship personal brand website.
